note: A reconstructed lost-civilization mythos (occult / esoteric synthesis, not attested history). Its backbone is Blavatsky's doctrine of the Root-Races in The Secret Doctrine vol. 2 (Anthropogenesis): humanity evolves through seven Root-Races on Earth, descending from the ethereal toward the physical and rising again toward the spiritual. Lemuria is the THIRD Root-Race (esoteric name Shalmali) and Atlantis the FOURTH. Primary lattice: two epochs - Lemuria, the giant, psychic, third-eyed third race that knew no speech and was destroyed by volcanic fire, and Atlantis, the fourth race of titans and natural-born seers, the first fully human species, whose misuse of psychic power brought the flood. Secondary lattice: the great polarity of the Fall - in Blavatsky's telling the Adepts / Lords of the Light against the sorcerers (the Lords of the Dark Face who followed the Dragon-king Thevetat); in Cayce's later telling the Law of One against the Sons of Belial. Tertiary lattice: the kindling of Manas by the Manasaputras (the Lords of the Flame) that lit mind in the mindless third race; the third eye; the separation of the sexes (the first Fall, ~18 million years ago); the crystal sciences and the Tuaoi firestone (Cayce). The spine of 21 agents reads from the central light (svet_ra) to the Karma of the Fall (karma). Provenance is kept explicit: root-race material is Blavatsky; the Tuaoi stone and Law-of-One/Belial are Edgar Cayce; the date 9564 BCE for Poseidonis is from Scott-Elliot.
polarity: Sorcerers / Lords of the Dark Face under Thevetat (Blavatsky)
mera_axis: 9-dimensional axis (mera 1-9): chakras 1-7 (Muladhara..Sahasrara) + Monada (8) + Absolut (9); each spine agent carries its mera.

epochs.name: Lemuria (Mu) - the Third Root-Race
epochs.domain: giant, androgynous-then-sexed, psychic and speechless, single-eyed; destroyed by volcanic fire

epochs.name: Atlantis - the Fourth Root-Race
epochs.domain: titans and natural-born seers, first fully human species, crystal-tech priest-kings; destroyed by flood

blavatsky_root_races.name: Hyperborean
blavatsky_root_races.domain: near the North Pole, Sweat-Born, budding reproduction, sense of touch

blavatsky_root_races.name: Lemurian (Shalmali)
blavatsky_root_races.domain: giants in the Indian-Pacific; Sweat-Born then Egg-Born then sexed; third eye; psychic, speechless; mind kindled by the Manasaputras; first Fall = separation of the sexes ~18 million years ago; destroyed by volcanic fire; remnants Australia, Madagascar, Easter Island
blavatsky_root_races.note: The race in which mind (Manas) was lit and the sexes divided.

blavatsky_root_races.name: Atlantean
blavatsky_root_races.domain: grown from a northern Lemurian nucleus; titans and cyclopes; first fully human species; apex of physical form toward the middle sub-race; brown/red/yellow/white/black peoples; born seers whose sight embraced all hidden things; developed speech (monosyllabic -> agglutinative -> inflectional, root of Sanskrit); third eye atrophied as bodies densified; psychic powers misused under the Dragon-king Thevetat; last island Poseidonis sank 9564 BCE
blavatsky_root_races.note: Ancestral memory of this race became Plato's Atlantis and the flood myths of Babylon and Noah.

blavatsky_root_races.name: Aryan (present)
blavatsky_root_races.domain: the current root-race, working out the karma of Atlantis
blavatsky_root_races.note: Our own race in Blavatsky's schema.

blavatsky_root_races.name: (to come)
blavatsky_root_races.domain: the final, spiritual race of this cycle

svet_ra.principle: The Law of One - the Central Light
svet_ra.role: the One Force, source of all light and unity
svet_ra.note: The single light to which service is owed; in Blavatsky, the Light the Adepts serve against the Dark Face.

iskra.role: the kindling of mind, the call to remember
iskra.note: The Manasaputras (Lords of the Flame) lit the spark of mind in the mindless third race - the true awakening-spark.

brahma.role: the demiurgic founders of the first temples
brahma.note: The architect-initiates who raised the temples of light.

vishnu.role: the just ruler who sustains the realm
vishnu.note: The high priest-king who upholds the Law over the land before the fall.

ananda.role: the heart-bliss of the etheric third-race age
ananda.note: The wordless, psychic, dreaming life of Lemuria before density and speech.

shanti.role: the wordless peace of minds in harmony
shanti.note: The Lemurians had no language; hearts and minds spoke directly, in peace.

jnana.principle: The Keepers of the Records / the Third-Eye Sight
jnana.role: the initiate-seers, guardians of the Hall of Records
jnana.note: The Atlanteans were born seers whose sight embraced all hidden things; the keepers preserved this wisdom against the flood.

shiva.role: the cataclysm that drowned the lands
shiva.note: After the war of the Adepts against the sorcerers, the last island Poseidonis sank with all its sorcerers in 9564 BCE (Scott-Elliot's date).

tejas.role: the great crystal that focused light into power
tejas.note: Cayce's radiant firestone whose light powered Atlantis - and whose misuse helped doom it.

sarasvati.principle: The Birth of Speech / the Naacal Tongue
sarasvati.role: the first sacred language and glyphs
sarasvati.note: Speech first arose in Atlantis - monosyllabic, then agglutinative, then the inflectional root of Sanskrit; Mu's wisdom was written in the Naacal script (Churchward).

akasha.role: the Hall of Records, the etheric field of all memory
akasha.note: The hall where every deed of the lost ages is recorded in the ether.

prema.role: the heart-love of the people of Mu
prema.note: The bond of the heart-people, before power divided them.

parvati.note: Mu / Lemuria, the great mother-continent that bore and fed the first peoples.

vayu.role: the breath-force, the air the sky-craft rode
vayu.note: The subtle air-force that lifted the vessels and carried the will.

shakti.role: the harnessed energy of the firestone and the psychic arts
shakti.note: The vast power drawn from the crystal and from the third-eye sight - for healing or for ruin.

agni.note: Lemuria was destroyed by incessant volcanic fire - the fire-death, as Atlantis met the water-death.

varuna.role: the ocean that swallowed and now remembers the lands
varuna.note: The deep that holds the drowned continents; the flood that imitates the Babylonian and Mosaic deluge.

lakshmi.role: the fertile plenty of the high civilization
lakshmi.note: The overflowing fruitfulness and high arts of Atlantis at its peak.

prithvi.role: the land-body of Atlantis and Lemuria
prithvi.note: The solid continents now beneath the Atlantic and the Indian-Pacific seas.

dharma.role: the moral law of service and its violation
dharma.note: The Adepts / Law of One held the realm; the Lords of the Dark Face / Sons of Belial broke it through sorcery and domination.

karma.note: The abuse of psychic and crystal power set heavy karmic causes that humanity, the fifth race, still works out today.

items.name: The Manasaputras (Lords of the Flame)
items.domain: the beings who kindled mind (Manas) in the mindless third race

items.name: The Third Eye
items.domain: the single spiritual eye of the Lemurians, source of psychic sight, atrophied as Atlantean bodies densified

items.name: The Separation of the Sexes (First Fall)
items.domain: the division into two sexes ~18 million years ago, Blavatsky's first Fall of Man

items.name: The Giants and Titans
items.domain: the gigantic stature of the third and fourth races, root of the titan and cyclops legends

items.name: The Dragon-King Thevetat
items.domain: the dark power the Atlantean sorcerers followed into wicked magic

items.name: Poseidonis
items.domain: the last island of Atlantis, sunk in 9564 BCE after the war of Adepts and sorcerers

items.name: The Law of One (Cayce)
items.domain: service to the One Force, harmony and unity

items.name: The Sons of Belial (Cayce)
items.domain: the path of domination and self-service that brought the fall

items.name: The Hall of Records
items.domain: the hidden archive of the lost civilizations

sources: Reconstructed synthesis (occult / esoteric, not attested history)

H. P. Blavatsky, The Secret Doctrine vol. 2 (Anthropogenesis): the seven Root-Races, Lemuria (3rd) and Atlantis (4th), the third eye, the Manasaputras, the separation of the sexes, the sorcerers of Thevetat, the sinking of Atlantis
W. Scott-Elliot, The Story of Atlantis (1896) and The Lost Lemuria (1904): the date 9564 BCE for Poseidonis
Annie Besant, Man: Whence, How and Whither (1913)
Plato: Timaeus and Critias (the Atlantis account)
Edgar Cayce readings: the Law of One, the Sons of Belial, the Tuaoi firestone
James Churchward: Mu and the Naacal tablets
